name: Sweet Pickle Chicken Salad
directions: Place pickle juice and onion in blender or food processor.
Process until finely chopped.
Add chicken and process 3 fast pulses.
Add remaining ingredients and process 2 fast pulses.

name: Chicken Spread
directions: Simmer the chicken and garlic until chicken no longer runs pink when pierced.
Cut the chicken in 1" pieces.
Put all ingredients, including garlic, through blender or grinder.
Blend smoothly.
Chill and serve.

name: Chicken Liver Spread
directions: In 10-inch skillet melt butter; add chicken livers and garlic.
Cook over medium high heat, stirring occasionally, until liver is fork tender (6 to 8 minutes).
Stir in remaining spread ingredients.
Continue cooking until heated through (1 to 2 minutes).
Spoon into blender container or food processor.
Blend or process until smooth.
Press liver mixture into greased 2 cup mold or soup bowl.
Chill until firm (1 to 2 hours).
In small bowl, stir together all frosting ingredients.
Unmold liver spread onto a serving plate.
Frost liver spread, decorating if desired.

name: Chicken Salad
directions: Cook chicken breasts until done (broiling works well).
Shred chicken using food processor or something similar.
Finely dice water chestnuts and dill pickles.
Add water chestnuts and pickles to chicken, as well as the mayo and mustard.
Mix well.
Add salt and pepper to taste and possibly more mayonnaise if you prefer a smoother texture.
Tastes best after refrigerated for an hour or so.
Serve on crackers, or make into sandwich.

name: Ham Salad
directions: Combine all in large bowl and chill in fridge until serving time.

name: Chicken Salad Indio
directions: Combine all ingredients except mayonnaise in a bowl.
Add mayonnaise and mix well.
Refrigerate for several hous or until well chilled.
Serve with crackers.

name: Chicken Salad
directions: Mix chicken, celery, pecans, add salt& pepper to taste, fold in mayonaise and cream cheese, chill well, enjoy!
The time I've entered for cooking is actually for chilling.

name: Cashew Chicken Salad Sandwiches
directions: Combine all ingredients except bread and mix well.  Refrigerate to blend flavors, if desired, for several hours or up to a day.  Spread on bread and serve.
Note:  I use food processor to "grind" the chicken.

name: Ham and Cheese Spread
directions: Pulse ham in a food processor until finely chopped and transfer to small bowl.
Stir in remaining ingredients and stir to combine.
Spread on sandwiches and enjoy.

name: Mediterranean Chicken Cracker Topper
directions: Mix all ingredients except crackers togehter until well blended.
Cover.
Refridgerate for at least an hour to mix flavors
Top each cracker with 1 tsp chicken mixture.
Serve immediately.

name: Chicken Salad
directions: Combine all marinade ingredients except for Chicken.
Add chicken and marinate for at least 30 minutes but best for a couple of hours.
Bake Chicken at 350 degrees until done (based on thickness of chicken) approximately 20-30 minute.
Remove chicken from pan to cool.  Discard any remaining marinade.  Once chicken has cooled cut into small pieces or shred by hand into large bowl.
Add all mixture ingredients to bowl.
Stir throroughly until well combined.
Chill for approximately an hour.
Serve on crackers or bread product as preferred.

name: Ham and Dill Pickle Spread
directions: Finely dice ham.
In medium bowl, mix ham with all other ingredients.
Serve immediately on bread or with crackers, or cover and refrigerate.

name: 3 Ingredient Chicken Salad
directions: Mix together and refrigerate until ready to serve.
